body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55742", "cvss": {"score": 9.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:H/SI:H/SA:H"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-352", "name": "Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)"}], "description": "Cotonti 1.0.0 (master branch, commit f43f1fc3) is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in the administration rights handler. In system/admin/admin.rights.php, the rights update action ('a=update') modifies group access rights (including via cot_auth_add_group) without calling cot_check_xg() to validate the anti-CSRF token. A remote attacker who lures an authenticated administrator into visiting a malicious page can force the browser to submit a forged request that grants elevated permissions to an attacker-controlled group, escalating privileges to administrator. Because Cotonti administrators can modify templates and configuration, this can be further leveraged toward remote code execution.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00227, "percentile": 0.13157}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7g3p-35vc-mgjr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T14:52:08Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7g3p-35vc-mgjr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7g3p-35vc-mgjr"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55742"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-18T08:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-06-18T12:40:25Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-55742", "https://github.com/Cotonti/Cotonti", "https://github.com/Cotonti/Cotonti/blob/f43f1fc38ba4e02027786dad9dac1435c7c52b30/system/admin/admin.rights.php#L53", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7g3p-35vc-mgjr"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Cotonti/Cotonti", "summary": "Cotonti: Cross-Site Request Forgery in the administration rights handler", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T14:52:09Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7g3p-35vc-mgjr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "cotonti/cotonti"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Cotonti: Cross-Site Request Forgery in the administration rights handler
